items.title: Instant Setup, No Coding
items.description: AI-powered no-code platform. Deploy in minutes, not weeks. Your growth funnel is live before you finish your coffee.

items.title: AI-Powered Optimization

items.description: Real-time analytics dashboards. See exactly what's working. Make decisions, not guesses.

items.quote: We expected to spend 3 months setting up. Fabrika had us live in 2 days. The AI optimization freed up 20 hours a week from our team.

items.quote: Our team is just 3 people. Fabrika gave us the horsepower of a 20-person marketing team. Our CAC dropped 40% in the first month.

sections.heading: Ready to Automate Your Growth?
sections.description: Join 200+ brands that have transformed their funnels with Fabrika. Get started free. No credit card required. Scale without the headcount.

items.question: Do I need technical skills to use Fabrika?
items.answer: Not at all. Fabrika is built for everyone. No coding required. Our AI handles the technical heavy lifting. If you can describe your funnel, you can use Fabrika.

items.question: What if I only have a small budget?
items.answer: Perfect. Fabrika works with budgets from $500 to $500K+ per month. Our AI optimizes regardless of spend level. The efficiency gains are proportional.

items.question: How fast will I see results?
items.answer: Setup: day 1. First insights: day 3. First optimizations: week 1. Real growth: weeks 2-4. Most clients see 30-50% improvement in their first 30 days.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: 100% encrypted, SOC 2 certified, GDPR compliant. Your data is yours. We never sell it, share it, or use it for anything except your account.

items.question: Can I integrate with my existing tools?
items.answer: Yes. Fabrika connects with Shopify, WooCommerce, Stripe, Google Analytics, Meta Ads, TikTok, and more. Full API available for custom integrations.

items.question: What's the difference between Fabrika and other platforms?
items.answer: We're not just a reporting tool. Fabrika autonomously optimizes your funnels with AI. Set it once, watch it improve automatically. No more manual tweaking.
